title: Khaitan's Mukul Aggarwal joins CP Plus as General Counsel
description: Khaitan & Co Partner Mukul Aggarwal has forayed into the role of an in-house counsel, joining CP Plus as General Counsel.Aggarwal is a 2012 graduate of National Law University, Jodhpur. He earned an LLM in Corporate Law from the University of Cambridge in 2019.With over 12 years of experience, Aggarwal is a corporate lawyer dealing with private equity, private debt, M&A, finance, joint ventures, and capital raising corporate transactions.
